scripts.prestart: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src=p.resolve(__dirname,'../eudistack-platform-dev/dev-tools/schemas');const dst=p.resolve(__dirname,'src/assets/schemas');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.json')&&fs.statSync(p.join(src,f)).isFile()).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f)));console.log('Schemas synced from platform-dev')}else{console.log('Warning: platform-dev schemas not found, using bundled schemas')}"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');const src=p.resolve(__dirname,'../eudistack-platform-dev/dev-tools/schemas');const dst=p.resolve(__dirname,'src/assets/schemas');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.json')&&fs.statSync(p.join(src,f)).isFile()).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f)));console.log('Schemas synced from platform-dev')}else{console.log('Warning: platform-dev schemas not found, using bundled schemas')}"
